nodes.context: Canadian white supremacist neo-Nazi organized crime group founded in 2003 in Edmonton, Alberta, active in Western Canada.
Outlaw motorcycle club; close associate of White Boy Posse founder.
Rival gang that kidnapped and assaulted White Boy Posse members in 2004.

edges.evidence_quote: The White Boy Posse was founded in the year 2003 by Sean "Fat Mike" Jackson, a close associate of the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club.
edges.context: White Boy Posse founder was a close associate of Hells Angels, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang first received media attention in Edmonton in 2004 after five White Boy Posse members were kidnapped and assaulted by rival gang the Crazy Dragon Killers.
edges.context: Crazy Dragon Killers kidnapped and assaulted White Boy Posse members, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels Motorcycle Club Syndicate Motorcycle Club
edges.context: Infobox lists Syndicate Motorcycle Club as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bandidos Motorcycle Club , Manitoba Warriors , Crazy Dragon Killers , Indian Posse
edges.context: Infobox lists Bandidos Motorcycle Club as a rival.
